title: Tool Invocation & Tool Call Loop
activity_flow: START: Agent.prompt(AgentPrompt) → GeneratesText.prompt()
GeneratesText: dispatch PromptingAgent event
GeneratesText: listenForToolInvocations → gateway.onToolInvocation(invokingCb, invokedCb)
GeneratesText: gateway.generateText(provider, model, instructions, messages, tools, schema, options, timeout)
Gateway: buildTextRequestBody(provider, model, instructions, messages, tools, schema, options)
Gateway: withErrorHandling → HTTP POST to LLM endpoint [wrapped in HandlesFailoverErrors]
[ERROR PATH] HTTP 429 → throw RateLimitedException → ProviderFailedOver event
[ERROR PATH] HTTP 503 → throw ProviderOverloadedException → ProviderFailedOver event
[ERROR PATH] credit pattern match → throw InsufficientCreditsException → ProviderFailedOver event
Gateway: validateTextResponse(data) — throws AiException on error/failed status
Gateway: parseTextResponse(data, ...) → processResponse(data, ..., steps=[], messages=[], depth=0)
=== LOOP: processResponse ===
Extract: text, toolCalls, finishReason, usage, citations from LLM response
Create Step(text, toolCalls, [], finishReason, usage, meta) → push to steps[]
Push AssistantMessage(text, toolCalls) to messages[]
DECISION: finishReason == ToolCalls AND toolCalls non-empty AND depth < maxSteps?
[NO → EXIT LOOP] Build final TextResponse/StructuredTextResponse with all steps, toolCalls, toolResults
[YES → CONTINUE] executeToolCalls(toolCalls, tools):
For each ToolCall:
findTool(toolCall.name, tools) — match by class_basename
[NOT FOUND] skip / continue
[FOUND] fire invokingToolCallback(tool, arguments) → dispatch InvokingTool event
tool.handle(new Request(arguments)) → execute tool logic
fire toolInvokedCallback(tool, arguments, result) → dispatch ToolInvoked event
create ToolResult(id, name, arguments, result, resultId)
Update current Step: replace with Step(text, toolCalls, toolResults, ...)
Push ToolResultMessage(toolResults) to messages[]
continueWithToolResults(..., depth+1):
Build follow-up request body with tool result payloads
withErrorHandling → HTTP POST to LLM endpoint (same timeout preserved)
validateTextResponse(data)
RECURSE: processResponse(data, ..., steps, messages, depth+1) → back to LOOP
=== END LOOP ===
GeneratesText: wrap TextResponse into AgentResponse with steps, toolCalls, toolResults, messages
GeneratesText: dispatch AgentPrompted event
END: return AgentResponse
loop_termination_conditions: toolCalls is empty in current step

key_data_structures.ToolCall: id, name, arguments[], resultId?, reasoningId?, reasoningSummary?
key_data_structures.Step: text, toolCalls[], toolResults[], finishReason, usage, meta

key_relationships: OpenAiGateway uses InvokesTools (trait) — executeTool, findTool, onToolInvocation
OpenAiGateway uses ParsesTextResponses (trait) — processResponse, executeToolCalls, continueWithToolResults
GeneratesText calls gateway.onToolInvocation to register InvokingTool/ToolInvoked event dispatchers
processResponse calls executeToolCalls which calls InvokesTools.executeTool
continueWithToolResults re-calls processResponse recursively (tail-recursive tool loop)
HandlesFailoverErrors.withErrorHandling wraps every HTTP call (initial + follow-ups)
important_notes: Timeout is passed through all loop iterations unchanged (verified by TimeoutInToolLoopTest)
maxSteps defaults to round(count(tools) * 1.5) if not set via TextGenerationOptions
OpenAI uses previous_response_id chaining for stateful conversation; Anthropic appends messages array
Both OpenAI and Anthropic gateways implement same loop pattern via their own ParsesTextResponses traits
ProviderFailedOver event is dispatched by provider layer when FailoverableException is caught
Tool lookup is by class_basename(tool) === toolCall.name — class name must match LLM tool name
